# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-1-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-1
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP2
---
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-2-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-2
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP2
---
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-ms1-ms2
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: microservice-1-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        names: ["default"]
---
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-ms2-ms1
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: microservice-2-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        names: ["default"]
